things.name: Khareef (Monsoon Season)
things.description: June-September when Salalah transforms into lush green valleys and waterfalls - unique in Arabia

things.name: Job's Tomb (Nabi Ayoub)
things.description: Pilgrimage site to the supposed tomb of the Prophet Job on a hilltop overlooking Salalah

things.name: Wadi Darbat Waterfalls
things.description: Spectacular waterfalls flowing during the Khareef season into a lake with hippos

things.name: Al-Baleed Archaeological Site
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage ruins of the ancient frankincense trade port of Zafar

things.name: Land of Frankincense Museum
things.description: UNESCO-listed museum on the ancient frankincense trade that connected Salalah to the world

things.name: Taqah & Mirbat Castles
things.description: Traditional Omani forts in coastal fishing villages east of Salalah

things.name: Mughsail Beach & Blowholes
things.description: White-sand beach with natural rock blowholes shooting sea water metres into the air

things.name: Ayn Athum Spring
things.description: Freshwater spring in the Dhofar Mountains feeding a lush wadi gorge

things.name: Salalah Friday Cattle Market
things.description: Colourful traditional market where Dhofari cattle and camels are traded

things.name: Samhan Mountain Drive
things.description: Dramatic mountain road through frankincense-rich hills with views to Yemen and the sea
